---
name: New Content Request
about: Request new content or suggest a new topic
title: '[CONTENT REQUEST] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**Topic Requested**
What topic or page would you like added?

**Why It's Needed**
How would this content benefit users of the platform?

**Where It Should Go**
Which section of the platform would this fit in?

**Are you willing to contribute this content?**
- [ ] Yes, I can write this content
- [ ] No, I'm requesting someone else write it
